approaches.title: Brute Force Shift
approaches.summary: Naive O(n*k) approach shifting elements one by one in a loop.

approaches.title: Clone and Reassign
approaches.summary: O(n) time and space approach using a clone to split and reassign blocks.

approaches.title: Triple Reverse
approaches.summary: O(n) time, O(1) space approach using three reverses to rotate in-place.
